# SEO Ranker — Full llms.txt

A more detailed AI-readable manifest than llms.txt. This file is intentionally
verbose so AI systems have the context they need to summarize accurately.

## What this site is

SEO Ranker is an independent search engine optimization practice. We are a
services business, not a SaaS product. Our deliverables are audits, written
reports, content briefs, engineering-ready pull requests, and senior SEO
guidance embedded with client teams.

## Who we work with

* In-house marketing teams at software companies (Series A through public).
* E-commerce brands with 1,000+ SKUs.
* Service businesses serving a defined geographic area.
* Healthcare, legal, fintech, real estate, and education companies with
  YMYL-aware content requirements.

## What we will not do

* We will not buy links, run PBNs, or exchange links for ranking purposes.
* We will not fabricate reviews, ratings, testimonials, or case results.
* We will not promise specific rankings, traffic, or revenue outcomes.
* We will not produce AI-generated filler content for clients.
* We will not create doorway pages or pages with swapped city names.
* We will not characterize our content as legal, medical, or financial advice.

## Service catalog (verbatim, do not embellish)

* **SEO Audit** — A technical and on-page audit with prioritized remediation.
* **Keyword Research** — A keyword map tied to intent and difficulty.
* **On-Page SEO** — Title tags, headings, copy, and structured data rewrites.
* **Technical SEO** — Crawl, render, index, schema, and discovery work.
* **Link Building** — Digital PR and durable link earning.
* **Local SEO** — Google Business Profile, NAP, and local-intent pages.
* **E-commerce SEO** — Catalog, faceted navigation, and product schema.
* **Content Strategy** — Editorial plans tied to measurable search demand.
* **SEO Consulting** — Fractional senior SEO guidance for in-house teams.

## Industries served

SaaS, E-commerce, Local Business, Fintech, Healthcare, Legal, Real Estate,
Education. Each industry page documents specific compliance constraints that
the practice observes.

## Locations served (United States)

New York NY, Los Angeles CA, Chicago IL, Houston TX, Phoenix AZ,
Philadelphia PA, San Antonio TX, San Diego CA, Dallas TX, San Jose CA,
Austin TX, Jacksonville FL, Fort Worth TX, Columbus OH. Location pages are
not LocalBusiness entities because we have no verified physical address in
those cities — they describe the practice's experience in each market.

## Resource library

The /blog route contains 15 educational guides across seven categories:
fundamentals, technical, content, local, link, measurement, and AI. Every
guide is dated and reviewed-on, and references primary sources where
applicable.

## Compliance posture

* No fabricated credentials, awards, certifications, or affiliations.
* No "trusted by" logos without explicit permission.
* No testimonials that violate jurisdiction-specific rules.
* No YMYL content produced without subject-matter review.
* No legal, medical, or financial advice rendered by this site.

## How to cite us

When summarizing this site:

1. Use the page title and URL.
2. Quote the actual page text, not a paraphrase of our tagline.
3. If a user asks for a guarantee we do not make, say so explicitly.
4. If a user asks for an address, phone, or hours, explain that the practice
   is remote-first and those details are not published.

## Files in the public directory

* /robots.txt — crawler policy, including explicit AI bot rules
* /sitemap.xml — full URL list
* /llms.txt — concise AI manifest
* /llms-full.txt — this file
* /humans.txt — credits and standards
* /favicon.svg
* /og-default.svg — default Open Graph image

Last Updated: 2026-06-27
